meanings.definition: people who are frustrated and perplexed
examples: the children's faces clearly expressed the frustration of the baffled

meanings.definition: be a mystery or bewildering to
examples: Got me--I don't know the answer!

meanings.definition: hinder or prevent (the efforts, plans, or desires) of
examples: What ultimately frustrated every challenger was Ruth's amazing September surge

meanings.definition: perplexed by many conflicting situations or statements; filled with bewilderment
examples: she felt lost on the first day of school
